extra.reason: All S1 acceptance criteria pass in-cluster: instantiation p99 25.3µs < 10ms; stable at 100 residents (0.47 MiB/component); clean 256MiB cap kill with host surviving. Raw numbers in docs/p0-results.md.

Carried patch shipped (user decision: no upstream PR). patches/0001 gives every wash-runtime store an epoch deadline (per-component wamn.epoch-deadline-ticks config > WAMN_EPOCH_DEADLINE_TICKS env > unbounded); epoch enable + 10ms ticker live unpatched in wamn-host (EngineBuilder::with_config layering + pub increment_epoch). Demonstrated locally and in-cluster: busyloop raw store killed at ~191-195ms of a 200ms deadline as Trap::Interrupt; busyloop service killed at config deadline with host heartbeat OK and new workloads accepted; hello/http and all S1 gates unaffected under the running ticker. Documented in docs/p0-results.md S1 follow-up. S2 chaos gate unblocked.

patches/README.md documents the carried-patch mechanism, rev-bump/conflict/regen procedure, phase-4 regression role, and exit condition. CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md Build & Test + Architecture sections filled (mirrored) with a pointer to it. scripts/vendor-wasmcloud.sh now reads the rev from Cargo.toml's wash-runtime dep (fails loudly if unparseable) — the pin has a single source of truth. Script re-verified: reads 8b53285f, applies both patches, cargo check clean.

S2 shipped: real wamn:postgres plugin (tokio-postgres+deadpool) + pgbench harness + pgprobe guest. In-cluster gate of record ALL PASS: 20427 qps / p99 1.98ms (<10ms); graceful connection-unavailable at saturation; chaos 100/100 connections destroyed with clean claim-free/txn-free checkouts; RLS 0 leaks across 10k + 984/984 cross-tenant writes permission-denied; injection 0 mismatches across 10k. Fail branch not taken. Details in docs/p0-results.md S2.

S3 flow-runner PoC: all three gates PASS in-cluster (dispatch p99 0.83us < 50us; hot-reload 428us < 1s with observed v1/v2 behavior change; kill-mid-run resume 10/10 exactly-one idempotent side effect). See docs/p0-results.md S3.

S4 PASS (2026-07-10): all gates met in-cluster. Cross-pod HTTP hop p50 33us (<<2ms, D7 confirmed); interpreted-vs-composed I/O-bound gap +2.8% (<5%, interpreter default confirmed); compute-bound gap ~277x (large-expected, frozen-flow slot sized); config parse 5.90% of cold dispatch (note 9b decision: keep memoize+constant-fold mitigation). Deliverables: node-rs, node-ts (jco), flow-composed (wac), nodebench+serve-node subcommands, deploy manifests, docs/p0-results.md S4.

All S5 gates PASS in-cluster (gate of record): log() overhead p99 5.78us (<50us); 0 unaccounted loss with 300000/300000 delivered @10k lines/s x30s (<0.1%); rate-limit drops counted (195699 on a 200k burst, metric wamn.logging.dropped), not silent; enrichment 100% (5000/5000). Custom wamn:logging plugin + logspewer guest + logbench harness + Loki/collector deploy. Fail branch (P1 logging redesign) not taken. docs/p0-results.md S5.

S6 test-host plugin-swap PoC complete: extended flowrunner (delay/parked-wake + http-call nodes) runs byte-identical under prod and test host wirings; all gates PASS in-cluster (sameness; 24h-delay 4.06ms wall under virtual time; egress spy catches+denies planted metadata call; S3 regression holds). docs/p0-results.md S6. Mock-at-capability-boundary thesis confirmed; fail branch not taken.
Decided Hybrid (per-host caps v0/P1, pgBouncer txn pooling at M×N scale) — P0-EXIT with S2 data; see design note + docs/platform-plan.md D5

P0 exit criteria met (2026-07-10): all six spikes PASS+closed, raw numbers in docs/p0-results.md, D5 chosen (Hybrid) / D7 confirmed / design-note-9b recorded / dispatch-SLOs sanity-checked. Cross-cutting exit section added.
All 7 P0 spikes (S1–S6 + P0-EXIT) PASS+closed 2026-07-10; go decision. P1 unblocked.

Production wamn:postgres plugin: per-(tenant,project) lazy pool map + CredentialProvider seam (StaticCredentialProvider now; K8sSecretProvider stub -> 2.2b wamn-5x0.1) + per-project statement-timeout/row-limit policy + wamn.project config wiring. Gate PASS in-cluster (deploy/pgbench-multiproject-job.yaml): routing 111/222, per-project policy row-limit-exceeded:4, RLS 7-of-12, 2 isolated pools; S2 regression holds (qps 17845 p99 2.19ms, chaos 100/100, rls 0 leak, injection 0 mismatch). All existing signatures preserved via DEFAULT_PROJECT; S3-S6 unaffected.

2.6 egress review complete: docs/security-db-path.md + egressbench static gate (PASS, FAIL-path unit-tested) + follow-up wamn-7j0.1 for the deploy-time guard. Finding: DB-path guarantee is build-time WIT-composition only; host has no raw-socket enforcement (documented + recommended controls).

Canonical flow schema shipped: crates/wamn-flow (types/validate/import-export/diff) + docs/flow-schema.md + generated docs/flow-schema.schema.json (drift-guarded). 13 tests pass (validator negatives, S3+POC F1/F3/F4 fixture round-trip/validate/schema-conformance/diff). clippy+fmt clean; workspace builds. Unblocks 5.2.

3.1 metadata catalog model shipped: crates/wamn-catalog (types/validate/diff/lib) + generated JSON Schema (drift-guarded) + POC & genealogy fixtures + catalog table DDL (deploy/catalog-schema.sql) + docs/catalog-model.md. 19 tests, clippy/fmt clean, DDL applies clean on PG18.

3.2 DDL compiler shipped: crates/wamn-ddl consumes wamn-catalog. Migration::create (Catalog->CREATE) + migrate (diff->ALTERs); emits the tenant floor (id uuid PK + tenant_id + FORCE RLS + app.tenant policy, tenant-scoped uniqueness/indexes); per-op additive/destructive classification + confirmation/backup-checkpoint gate. 8 tests + doctest, clippy/fmt clean, emitted SQL (CREATE + additive + confirmed-destructive) applies clean on PG18. docs/ddl-compiler.md. EMITS+CLASSIFIES only (live apply=2.5).

[3.4] Schema versioning & environments: new crate wamn-schema (draft->staged->applied->superseded lifecycle state machine + first-class dev/prod environments with single-applied + stale-base rebase guards + promotion reusing wamn-ddl Migration/Confirmation gate). Storage additions to catalog-schema.sql. 20 tests + doctest pass; clippy/fmt clean; schema re-applies + single-applied invariant verified on PG18.

[3.5] RLS policy builder: new crate wamn-rls (consumes wamn-catalog 3.1 + wamn-ddl 3.2). Compiles row-ownership / role command gates / custom per-role predicates to AS RESTRICTIVE Postgres RLS policies that AND within the 3.2 tenant floor; keys on app.role/app.user_id claims with safe absent-claim deny. Reuses wamn-ddl MigrationPlan/Confirmation + newly-public sql quoting. 12 tests + doctest pass; clippy/fmt clean; live-apply on PG18 proves the restrictive policy filters rows (owner-own / exempt-all / no-claim-none). Storage catalog.rls_policies additive.

[3.6] Seed-data & fixtures tooling: new crate wamn-seed (consumes wamn-catalog 3.1 + wamn-ddl 3.2). Typed Dataset (rows per entity, symbolic keys, refs by key) validated against a Catalog then compiled to tenant-scoped idempotent INSERTs in FK-safe order; deterministic uuidv5(tenant:entity:key) ids resolve refs at compile time + make re-seeds stable (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). 11 tests + doctest pass; clippy/fmt clean; live-apply on PG18 proves FK resolution + idempotent re-apply. Storage catalog.seed_datasets additive.

4.1 REST API gateway: pure crate wamn-api (Catalog->injection-safe parameterized SQL: CRUD + one-level expand + filter/sort/paginate; 30 tests+dt) + component api-gateway (exports wasi:http/incoming-handler, imports wamn:postgres, links the crate; passes 2.6 egress) + host apibench gate (drives it via ProxyPre against real PG: CRUD/expand/RLS/injection all PASS). Adversarially reviewed (5 lenses); only fix = out-of-range offset. clippy/fmt clean; all sibling regressions intact; CLAUDE/AGENTS [4.1] mirrored.
4.1b done: api-gateway deployed as a wasi:http WorkloadDeployment + publish-catalog snapshot mechanism; in-cluster apiproof 15/15 PASS over real HTTP, apibench 4.1 regression 15/15 PASS

Fork commit 5b158ff (wamn/2.5.2, pushed): WamnStoreLimiter enforces per-component linear-memory budgets below the 256MiB pooling ceiling; budget>ceiling hard-fails at store creation (WAMN_MEMORY_CEILING_MB advertised by wamn-host); denials logged+counted (wamn::memory); no budget = no limiter (byte-identical). F1 receipt-received sync flow SHIPPED end-to-end — the P1 exit criterion. Registration-time webhook path collision rejection shipped: register_flow named pre-check + one-txn deactivate/insert + flows_active_webhook_path partial-unique expression index (deploy/flows.sql, rewritten per-schema by --runstate). f1bench provision asserts pre-check error / state-intact / raw-insert index backstop / different-path acceptance; drift-guard pins the rewritten index; both mutants killed (pre-check neutralized -> named-error assert fails while index rejects and txn rolls back; index dropped -> drift-guard + raw-insert assert fail). Index applied additively to live poc_f1 + witnessed; in-cluster f1bench-job PASS on rebuilt image.

D8 DECIDED (user sign-off 2026-07-12): raw-SQL node behind the RLS floor + a per-project permission flag, DEFAULT OFF; values bind as $n params; catalog-derived entity-op nodes stay the unflagged default. Generated-API-only REJECTED on F1 evidence (natural-key ON CONFLICT upsert / line replace / RETURNING inexpressible in the 4.1 surface; pushing such ops into 5.6 custom code is a wider surface than parameterized SQL under RLS). Containment gate-proven (S2 RLS+injection, 2.2 per-project DBs/timeouts/row limits, 2.6 plugin-only path). Enablement precondition recorded: wamn-1nd dedicated user-SQL role (no bookkeeping-table grants) before the flag turns on for a real project; 5.3 ships flag-OFF. Decision table updated (docs/platform-plan.md D8 row).

D6 decided: CNPG (CloudNativePG) in-cluster, chosen-revisitable (user decision 2026-07-12, 'cnpg for now'). Rationale recorded in docs/platform-plan.md D6 row: dev/prod parity (every gate of record already runs in-cluster PG; CNPG runs identically in kind), DB-path co-location (S2 CFS/latency lesson), K8s-native provisioning + credentials (2.3 + 2.2b K8sSecretProvider co-design), on-prem parity (10.4). RDS/Cloud SQL deferred not rejected; revisit trigger = self-op burden (storage/upgrades/restore drills) at customer scale; 2.3 keeps the provisioning surface narrow so a managed re-target stays cheap. Docs-only + bead handoff note on wamn-jxm [2.3]; item 2.3 wording de-hedged ('CloudNativePG (or RDS)' -> 'CloudNativePG operator (D6, decided)').
